reason: Replace Effect.orDie with catchAll to prevent fiber crash on FS errors (permissions, corrupt file, missing). Logs warning and returns null so callers' `?? "{}"` fallback works.
Wrap synchronous JSONC parse and schema validation in Effect.try to catch throws and channel them through Effect's error channel instead of becoming unhandled defects in Effect.fnUntraced
